message:
fix(output): Add suggestions_enabled and init_suggestions functions

These functions were referenced in hook.rs and main.rs but missing from
the output module, causing build failures with rich-output feature.

- suggestions_enabled(): Returns whether suggestions should display
- init_suggestions(): Initializes global flag from --no-suggestions CLI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
